---
title: "CV"
pagetitle: "CV · Theodor Balan"
---

<main>

::: {.wrap}

## Work

Currently @[Booking.com](https://www.booking.com)

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-date}
2024 – now
:::
::: {}
::: {.cv-role}
Senior data scientist
:::
:::
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-date}
2022 – 2024
:::
::: {}
::: {.cv-role}
Data scientist
:::
::: {.cv-detail}
Causal inference and experimentation for two-sided marketplaces
:::
:::
:::

Previously @[Danone Nutricia Research](https://www.nutriciaresearch.com)

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-date}
2020 – 2022
:::
::: {}
::: {.cv-role}
Senior data scientist
:::
::: {.cv-detail}
Infant feeding patterns, feeding & growth, recipe optimisation with compositional data; causal inference, machine learning and data visualisation
:::
:::
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-date}
2019 – 2020
:::
::: {}
::: {.cv-role}
Statistician
:::
::: {.cv-detail}
Statistical protocol design, interim and post-analysis for phase 2 early-life-nutrition trials
:::
:::
:::

Previously at Leiden University Medical Center

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-date}
2013 – 2018
:::
::: {}
::: {.cv-role}
Trainee researcher / PhD student
:::
::: {.cv-detail}
[Department of Biomedical Data Sciences](https://www.lumc.nl/org/bds/?setlanguage=English&setcountry=en) · [Survival analysis group](https://www.lumc.nl/org/bds/research/medische-statistiek/survival-analysis/)
:::
:::
:::

## Education

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-date}
2018
:::
::: {}
::: {.cv-role}
PhD in Medical Statistics
:::
::: {.cv-org}
Leiden University
:::
::: {.cv-detail}
[PhD project: Advances in frailty models](../stuff/phd)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-date}
2013
:::
::: {}
::: {.cv-role}
MSc *cum laude* in Statistical science
:::
::: {.cv-org}
Leiden University
:::
::: {.cv-detail}
[Thesis: Joint Modeling of Recurrent and Terminal Events](https://www.universiteitleiden.nl/binaries/content/assets/science/mi/scripties/masterbalan.pdf) · [Master programme statistical science](http://www.math.leidenuniv.nl/statisticalscience/)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-date}
2011
:::
::: {}
::: {.cv-role}
BSc in Applied mathematics
:::
::: {.cv-org}
University of Bucharest
:::
:::
:::

## Tools & Skills

::: {.skill-note}
(^^^ = proficient &nbsp; ^^ = good &nbsp; ^ = basic)
:::

::: {.skill-row}
[Software development]{.skill-label}

[[R•••]{.lvl-3}]{.skill-value}
:::

::: {.skill-row}
[Version control]{.skill-label}

[[git••]{.lvl-2}]{.skill-value}
:::

::: {.skill-row}
[Coding languages]{.skill-label}

[[R•••]{.lvl-3}, [C++•]{.lvl-1}, [python•]{.lvl-1}, [bash•]{.lvl-1}]{.skill-value}
:::

::: {.skill-row}
[Statistical software]{.skill-label}

[[SPSS••]{.lvl-2}, [SAS•]{.lvl-1}]{.skill-value}
:::

::: {.skill-row}
[Typesetting]{.skill-label}

[[LaTeX•••]{.lvl-3}, [Markdown••]{.lvl-2}]{.skill-value}
:::

::: {.skill-row}
[Data visualization]{.skill-label}

[[ggplot2•••]{.lvl-3}, [d3.js•]{.lvl-1}]{.skill-value}
:::

::: {.skill-row}
[Web applications]{.skill-label}

[[shiny••]{.lvl-2}]{.skill-value}
:::

::: {.skill-row}
[Biostatistics & survival]{.skill-label}

[[•••]{.lvl-3}]{.skill-value}
:::

::: {.skill-row}
[Study design & epidemiology]{.skill-label}

[[••]{.lvl-2}]{.skill-value}
:::

::: {.skill-row}
[Mixed models]{.skill-label}

[[••]{.lvl-2}]{.skill-value}
:::

::: {.skill-row}
[Bayesian statistics]{.skill-label}

[[•]{.lvl-1}]{.skill-value}
:::

::: {.skill-row}
[Machine / deep learning]{.skill-label}

[[•]{.lvl-1}]{.skill-value}
:::

### R Expertise {.subhead}

- Full proficiency
- Data visualization (ggplot2)
- Data wrangling (tidyverse)
- Reporting & dashboards (rmarkdown, shiny)
- Package development and maintaining (frailtyEM, dynfrail)

### Other Languages {.subhead}

- SAS, working experience
- SPSS, working & teaching experience
- Python, working experience
- C++, limited experience
- bash, intermediate experience
- LaTeX, working experience
- Markdown, working experience
- Scala, limited experience

### Platforms {.subhead}

- Databricks, working experience
- SAS / LSAF, working experience

:::

</main>
